series_metadata.series_description: Official Certifications issued by the Boards of Elections showing the results of ongoing Local Option Elections. These Certifications are used to determine the issuance of Liquor Permits in a particular area, as to WET or DRY status.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: hard copy in office area ; Microform: microfilm in office area Pemanently. Duplicate copy kept off-site
